items.title: Has Visa’s 73.6% Three Year Surge Already Priced In Future Growth?
items.description: Wondering if Visa is still a buy at these levels, or if the easy money has already been made? Let us unpack what the current price really implies about its future. Visa has climbed 6.5% over the last month and is up 11.1% year to date, building on a strong 73.6% gain over three years. Those kinds of moves tend to signal shifting expectations around growth and risk. Recently, Visa has been in the spotlight for expanding its footprint in digital payments and cross border transactions, as...
